title: cynoglossum longipes
intro: Cynoglossum longipes, also known as the forked hound's-tongue or long-tongued hound's tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. The medicinal properties of Cynoglossum longipes have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the respiratory and gastrointestinal systems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including relief from bronchitis, coughs, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum longipes is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
